description: Chaos Probe capability pack manifest binding for Pack Runtime route gates, frontend sync, safe probe definitions, one-shot health checks, scheduler planning, metrics planning, degrade summaries, remediation hints, evidence export, and lightweight SDK import discovery.
principles: Expose safe chaos probes, health scoring, scheduler/metrics/degrade/alert planning, and JSON evidence export as an optional Pack Runtime capability instead of a hard-coded operations console feature.
Keep Chaos Probe method/path gates, frontend menu/route sync, and SDK import metadata in the pack manifest.
Let external projects import yunque-client/chaos-probe only when the Chaos Probe pack is installed and enabled.
